text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for my second summer camp with Smart
Falcon, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her motivation levels are through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Duh! The ocean means the beach, and the beach
means sand!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And sand means Silence Suzuka of the Sand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's new nickname is becoming
increasingly widespread among fans, and she
seems well aware of it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to borrow her name, I need to get
even stronger so I can do it justice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's strength is what allowed her to become a
star and capture everyone's heart.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I wanna be super-duper strong, just like my
namesake!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So strong I can... uh, I can... Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So strong I can part the seas with a single step!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This summer camp, I'm going to become a force
of nature!
